violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Door on walk-in cooler is rusty, no longer cleanable
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Bottom reach-in freezer needs to be cleaned

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Floors in kitchen need repair. Tears in floor. - Floor in walk-in cooler needs to be deep cleaned.
